title: Looking for Llamas to Join our Herd! 🦙🦙🦙

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there - Mark here, the Founder and Lead Llama at Green Llamas Consulting.

We are actively looking to partner with some fantastic monday.com experts to assist with our growing herd of clientele.

We need strong Llamas to join our team, but not any monday.com expert will do. We are looking for the “monday.com Unicorns ” (yes, they do exist). We need consultants that can do it all in monday, including Process Analysis, System Design, System Development, Training and Support. If you are also confident in integration tools such as make.com or Zapier…even better!

Offering extremely competitive rates, remote working and flexible work schedules working with our growing worldwide clientele.

If you are interested in learning more and would like to set up a time to discuss please let me know here or better yet, send me a note to info@greenllamas.com.

As always, check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mark.anley.

If you’re seeking dedicated experts or ‘unicorns’ to support monday.com system design and development, teaming up with a reputable monday.com consulting company is the ideal choice. Their consultants facilitate a smooth transition to help you function smarter and address project management priorities instantly. The consultants will do all for you, ranging from process analysis to training and support.
